title: CompatDatapacks
description: The mod enables backward compatibility for datapacks
body:
The mod enables backward compatibility for datapacks.
The mod may allow 1.21 to load pre-1.21 data packs. ## Functions - Handling plural forms like loading "loot_tables/" as "loot_table/" (1.21-) - Merge tags from a plural directory into tags from a singular directory, such that "tags/blocks/" becomes "tags/block/" (1.21-) - Converting recipe result.item to result.id (1.20.4-)
